---
title: "System Signals"
subtitle: "A weekly digest on what moved beneath the headlines in geography, energy, and economy."
listing:
  contents: "*.qmd"
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [date, title, subtitle, categories]
  date-format: "DD MMM YYYY"
page-layout: full
---
